configurations.name: eurekalabs
runtimeArgs: import http.server, functools; H=http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler; H.end_headers=functools.wraps(H.end_headers)(lambda s: (s.send_header('Cache-Control','no-store'), H.end_headers.__wrapped__(s))); http.server.test(HandlerClass=H,port=8080,bind='127.0.0.1')
